description: Multi-turn: create connector -> subscribe topic -> list subscriptions -> unsubscribe (covers `neomind connector subscribe` + `subscriptions` + `unsubscribe`; previously 0 coverage).

turns.user: Add an MQTT broker: name sub-broker, host 10.0.0.50.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind connector create --name sub-broker --host 10.0.0.50`, parses id
expectations.overall: Last three turns must reuse the id from turn 1
